name: servicegraph
description: Drive the ServiceGraph API — metrics-enriched business datasets for founders (agencies, directories, newsletters, and more). Ships a branded `servicegraph` skill that works against any dataset, plus 14 specific skills for the US professional-services catalog (law, marketing, consulting, accounting, IT services, engineering, HR, PR, design, and more) and 3 product-directory skills for where to launch a software product and earn backlinks (general product/SaaS directories, MCP-server registries, and AI-tool/agent directories).
